video_info.title: Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games
video_info.shortDescription: The 2026 Commonwealth Games in Glasgow is a scaled-down event featuring 10 sports across four venues, with a focus on sustainability and cost-efficiency, while hosting around 3,000 athletes from 74 Commonwealth nations and territories. Tune in to catch all the action, LIVE on Sony LIV.
